name: @mog/xlsx-corpus-eval
description: Production-path XLSX corpus performance gates and budgets

scripts.perf-smoke: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- perf-smoke --budgets file-io/xlsx/corpus-eval/budgets/perf-smoke.json
scripts.perf-golden: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- perf-golden --budgets file-io/xlsx/corpus-eval/budgets/perf-golden.json
scripts.perf-full: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- perf-full --budgets file-io/xlsx/corpus-eval/budgets/perf-full.json
